title: 16Pcs White Christmas Glitter Leaves 43cm Artificial Boston Fern Bush Tropical Leaves Fake Leaf Picks Sprays for Xmas Tree Decoration Flower Arrangment New Year Holiday Home Garden Decor
features: 🎄PACKAGE INCLUDE - The package includes 16pcs Christmas atmosphere decoration Fake Glitter Persian leaves, and each measures approx. 43 x 18 cm/ 17 x 7 inches. There are 5 different colors of red, white, silver ,rose gold and Champagne gold for you to choose and use, enough to satisfy your festive Christmas tree decoration demand, and you can also share with others.

🎄PREMIUM QUALITY - These christmas Glitter Leaves are made of high quality PE material and and decorated with glitter powder, which has a beautiful and eye-catching wonderful decorative effect, durable and not easy to deform and tear. The stem of this Christmas leaf are made of bendable wire can be free bending into any shape you prefer.(Note: it is normal for the glitter to come off a bit during transportation)

🎄CHRISTMAS DECOR - The best choice for decorating Christmas trees, vase, pot, flower arrangement. Buy these glitter pick sprays to decorate your home as an indispensable decoration for xmas,festivals, holidays,weddings, home, indoor, outdoor, dining table! they will light up the occasion and make you feel a stronger atmosphere.

🎄WIDE APPLICATIONS - The Christmas leaves decorations can be applied to holiday, wedding, anniversary, Christmas, Valentine's Day or other important occasions, eye catching ornaments for table, wreath, garland and vase, creating a scene filling both glamorous and impressive

🎄DIY CHRISTMAS PRESENTS - You can also add these Christmas tree leaves as cute embellishments for your present, then adorn them with a cloth or ribbon (not included) on the present box to make an exquisite keepsake present for your families, friends or colleagues, making your christmas gifts more unique.
